title: vitis setosa
intro: Vitis setosa, also known as the Chinese wild grape, is a type of plant species in the Vitaceae family, characterized by its woody vine and small, edible grapes. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Vitis setosa include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce cholesterol levels, and alleviate symptoms of fever and digestive issues. Vitis setosa is often prepared as an herbal tea, extract, or tincture, and is used in traditional Chinese medicine to promote overall well-being and vitality.
intro_study: According to "Chemical & pharmaceutical bulletin", Vitis setosa extract contains compounds that have shown significant writhing inhibition, indicating potential analgesic benefits.
